nasb.text: and commanded Judah to seek the Lord God of their fathers and to observe the law and the commandment.

esv.text: and commanded Judah to seek the Lord, the God of their fathers, and to keep the law and the commandment.

cnv.text: 吩咐猶大人尋求耶和華他們列祖的　神，遵行他的律法和誡命。

ccb.text: 命令犹大人寻求他们祖先的上帝耶和华，遵行祂的律法和诫命。
